task_description: Migrate the Clear-mind app from monolithic blob persistence (single localStorage key + single Firestore document) to a per-workspace persistence architecture using localStorage granular keys and Firestore subcollections. Includes migration logic from old format, 3 independent debounced autosave hooks, UUID-based ID generation, and backward-compatible import/export.

verification.summary: npm run build exits 0. No test framework exists in this project. Chunk size warning (866KB) is pre-existing and unrelated to changes. All 3 features implemented and building successfully. Post-review fix pass (v1) addressed 7 issues. Post-review fix pass (v2) addressed 4 remaining issues: un-debounced meta writes moved inside debounced closure, save-only-changed-workspaces via prevWorkspacesRef, Firestore cleanup on project deletion via deleteProjectFromFirestore, and stale closure risk documented with explanatory comment.
